yafs.distribution¶

Distribution utilities for YAFS.

This module defines a small hierarchy of classes that encapsulate time distributions used in the simulator (for example, inter-arrival times of messages or delays between events).

class yafs.distribution.Distribution(name)[source]¶

Abstract base class for all distributions.

Subclasses must override next() to return the next sampled value from the underlying distribution.

next()[source]¶

Return the next sampled value.

Subclasses must implement this method.

class yafs.distribution.deterministicDistributionStartPoint(start, time, **kwargs)[source]¶

Deterministic distribution with a different first value.

The first call to next() returns start; all subsequent calls return time.

next()[source]¶

Return the next sampled value.

Subclasses must implement this method.

class yafs.distribution.deterministic_distribution(time, **kwargs)[source]¶

Deterministic distribution that always returns the same value.

next()[source]¶

Return the next sampled value.

Subclasses must implement this method.

class yafs.distribution.exponentialDistribution(lambd, seed=1, **kwargs)[source]¶

Deprecated exponential distribution wrapper.

This class is kept for backwards compatibility. Prefer using exponential_distribution instead.

next()[source]¶

Return the next sampled value.

Subclasses must implement this method.

class yafs.distribution.exponentialDistributionStartPoint(start, lambd, seed=1, **kwargs)[source]¶

Exponential distribution with a different first value.

The first call to next() returns start; subsequent calls sample from an exponential distribution with parameter lambd.

next()[source]¶

Return the next sampled value.

Subclasses must implement this method.

class yafs.distribution.exponential_distribution(lambd, seed=1, **kwargs)[source]¶

Exponential distribution wrapper.

Values are sampled from an exponential distribution with parameter lambd and converted to integers. A minimum value of 1 is enforced to avoid zero delays.

next()[source]¶

Return the next sampled value.

Subclasses must implement this method.

class yafs.distribution.uniformDistribution(min, max, seed=1, **kwargs)[source]¶

Uniform integer distribution between min and max (inclusive).

next()[source]¶

Return the next sampled value.

Subclasses must implement this method.
